stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
A Performance Class A aeroplane flies for a Commercial Air Transport operation. The flight is conducted as scheduled, but during the final approach at the destination aerodrome, the flight crew initiates a missed approach and diverts to the destination alternate. During the missed approach the landing gear remains retracted, but the landing gear door remains extended. Given the following information, calculate the revised estimated landing mass at the destination alternate aerodrome, applying the Basic Fuel Scheme.

DOM: 43 550 kg
Traffic Load: 17 460 kg
Taxi Fuel: 400 kg
Take-off Fuel: 13 173 kg
Trip Fuel: 8850 kg
Contingency Fuel: 443 kg
Alternate Fuel: 1500 kg
Final Reserve Fuel: 1380 kg
Extra Fuel and Discretionary Fuel: 1000 kg
